rules.rule: A view service must coordinate foundation services to produce view models.
A view service must not return JSX or contain JSX expressions.
A view service must not import React or any React hook.
A view service must not call brokers directly. Default flow: View Service → Foundation Service → Broker.
A view service may aggregate, sort, filter, and map data into view models.
A view service must not contain CSS class names, Bootstrap strings, or component names.
